title: tafalla parvifolia
intro: Tafalla parvifolia, also known as Tafallaea parvifolia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues like coughs and colds. Tafalla parvifolia can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and roots can be used in herbal remedies.
